name: Churro Apple Pies
method: Mix apples with lemon juice in a saucepan.
Whisk water and cornstarch until it is lump-free.
Put the mixture into a saucepan over the medium heat.
Add brown sugar, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
Mix to combine it well. Bring it to boil. Whisk continuously.
When the mixture starts to thicken, put the diced apple in it.
Lower the heat and cover the pan.
Let it cook for around 8-10 minutes until soft.
Turn down the heat while keeping it covered, and let it cool.
Fill each churro bowl with apple pie filling.
Drizzle ice cream and caramel sauce.
To prepare caramel sauce, mix heavy cream and brown sugar
into a saucepan over the medium heat. When sugar just starts to melt,
Lower heat and continue cooking until sauce thickens.
Let it cool, then pour onto the Apple Pie Churros.
